chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1620 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.12.2024 Mrs. Razia Ali Zaman, advocate for petitioners *** The petitioners have invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking their appointment as teachers. However, a perusal of the record reflects that such process of recruitment/appointment dates as far back as the year 2013. Analogous petitions, including C.P No.D-868 of 2022 have already been dismissed by a learned Division Bench of this Court on the point of laches. Under the given circumstances, this petition also stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
